channel.title: Certificates on Tahrin Jahan Ayat — Child Artist Portfolio
channel.description: Recent content in Certificates on Tahrin Jahan Ayat — Child Artist Portfolio

item.title: Best Performer
item.description: Recognized as the Best Performer for outstanding discipline and speaking skills in the K.G. class.

item.title: Annual Dance Competition
item.description: Awarded 1st place for performance in the Annual Dance Competition for the Nursery class.

item.title: Best All Rounder
item.description: Recognized as the Best All Rounder in the Nursery class.

item.title: Poem Recitation
item.description: Awarded 1st place for poem recitation in the Nursery class.

item.title: Annual Cultural Programme
item.description: Recognized for rhyme performance in the Annual Cultural Programme for the Play Group.

item.title: Best Discipline
item.description: Awarded for Best Discipline in the PG class.

item.title: Dance Competition
item.description: Awarded 1st Prize for performance in the Dance Competition for the Play class.
